title: Savory Crispy Jamaican Bacon Skillet
description: A festive and crispy Jamaican dish featuring bacon and poached eggs, perfect for a low-carb breakfast. This recipe is cooked to perfection in an iron teppan skillet.
instructions: Preheat the iron teppan skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the diced scotch bonnet peppers and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the thick-cut bacon and cook until crispy, about 5 minutes per side.
Remove the bacon from the skillet and set aside.
Crack the eggs into the skillet and poach until the whites are set and the yolks are cooked to desired doneness.
Season the eggs with salt, black pepper, allspice, and thyme.
Serve the poached eggs on top of the crispy bacon and scotch bonnet peppers.
Garnish with additional thyme if desired.
